message.content: @startuml title Sequence Diagram - Node to RF Hub Communication Flow participant "Node" as N1 #lightblue:green actor "RF" as RfHub #pink:red database Link #green:white rectangle testdomain.com { participant hub2 <> } N1 ->>RfHub : BROADCAST: Broadcast Message\n(Repeated every five minutes while link idle). Note this message contains start flag set on first frame sent after broadcast received by node from rfhub server side connection established between them via control messages exchange process which includes request/grant steps followed up data transfer phase where actual payload information gets transmitted back forth until completion acknowledged properly using ack frames containing sequence numbers along error correction codes appended at end each packet/frame exchanged during communication session initiated here.. activate RfHub deactivate RfHub note right of N1\nleft over RfhUB :\ First Frame Has Start Flag Set On It So That Receiver Can Identify Beginning Of New Transmission Session Properly Without Any Ambiguity Or Confusion Regarding Where Exactly Does Current Packet Ends And Next One Begins Within Stream Being Received Over Network Interface Card Installed Inside Computer System Running This Software Application Program Written In Java Programming Language Using Eclipse IDE Development Environment Toolset Provided By Oracle Corporation Based Out California USA Headquarters Location Worldwide Operations Center Located There Too Alongside Other Regional Offices Spread Across Globe Including Europe Asia Pacific Region Etcetera... loop Repeat Until All Data Frames Are Sent alt If LastFrameHasEndFlagSetThenResponseWillBeSentBackInReverseOrderOtherwiseJustContinueSendingMoreDataFramesUntilDone note bottom left corner screen showing how  tablet devices smart watches wearable
